ValidationRule.description: Prevents users from editing the Cost Sheet while discount approval is pending. The cost sheet is locked (Is_Locked__c = true) from the time discounts are submitted for approval until the approval is completed or recalled.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( Is_Locked__c = TRUE, OR( ISCHANGED(Base_Price__c), ISCHANGED(Base_Rate_Sqft__c), ISCHANGED(Super_Builtup_Area__c), ISCHANGED(Carpet_Area__c), ISCHANGED(UDS__c), ISCHANGED(PLC_Charges__c), ISCHANGED(Amenity_Charges__c), ISCHANGED(Infra_Charges__c), ISCHANGED(Doc_Charges__c), ISCHANGED(Move_In_Charges__c), ISCHANGED(Floor_Rise_Sqft__c), ISCHANGED(Corpus_Fund_Sqft__c), ISCHANGED(Maintenance_Sqft_Month__c), ISCHANGED(Maintenance_Months__c), ISCHANGED(Discount_1__c), ISCHANGED(Discount_2__c), ISCHANGED(Discount_3__c), ISCHANGED(Discount_4__c), ISCHANGED(Discount_5__c), ISCHANGED(Discount_6__c), ISCHANGED(GST_Percentage__c), ISCHANGED(Registration_Pct__c), ISCHANGED(Stamp_Duty_Pct__c), ISCHANGED(Payment_Plan_Type__c), ISCHANGED(Unit__c), ISCHANGED(Lead__c), ISCHANGED(Project__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: This Cost Sheet cannot be edited while discount approval is pending. Please wait for the approval to be completed, or recall the approval first.
